hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE 'git([^|;&]*[[:space:]])?push([[:space:]][^|;&]*)?[[:space:]](-[a-zA-Z]*f|--force([-=][^ ]*)?)([[:space:]]|$)|git([^|;&]*[[:space:]])?push[[:space:]][^|;&]*[[:space:]][+]' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Force pushes are banned (owner rule): fix forward with new commits and new version tags instead."}}' || true
